description_long: This house features a two-story main structure with a brick exterior and a flat roof, complemented by an attached single-story wing with a red-tiled gable roof. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and includes a paved driveway leading to a detached garage with a matching tiled roof. The front facade has two large windows and a wooden door, while the side and rear elevations display a mix of smaller windows and a garden area with greenery. The upper floor appears unfinished or under construction, with visible interior walls and no roof. The overall design is practical and suburban, with a blend of modern and traditional elements.
description: A two-story brick house with a flat roof, attached single-story wing with a red-tiled gable roof, fenced yard, and detached garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two large windows, and a patch of green lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long brick facade, tiled roof wing, and garden area with greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage, tiled roof, and the back of the main house with visible upper floor walls.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, garage door, and a white gate in the wooden fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple wooden door with no porch, flush to facade, and a small step up from the lawn.
